judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly states that Zema cannot run for governor in 2026 because he already served two terms (2018-2022 and 2022-2026), which is factually wrong as his first term was 2019-2022 and his second is 2023-2026, and also incorrectly states he resigned in 2026 to run for president, which has not happened yet.
The response correctly states that Zema cannot run for re-election as governor due to having served two consecutive terms and connects this to his presidential candidacy.
